{{CargoRelic
|name=Gold Illusion Card
|class_id=20549
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Made of pure gold, the magical card is of great value, even if you don't recognize the exquisite patterns on it, just feel its weight.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=15
|civ=31
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +3<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss2=Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +6<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss3=Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +9<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss4=Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +9<br>Participated: 40/40
|ss7=Per Kaleido Valley participation, Snail ATK +9<br>Participated: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
